zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen於大約1126年出生時，他的父親Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND53歲，母親Liukard Von Regensburg38歲。他和Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1208年1月26日享年83歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen于大约1126年出生时，他的父亲Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND53岁，母亲Liukard Von Regensburg38岁。他和Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1208年1月26日享年83岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen was born about 1126, his father, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, was 53 and his mother, Liukard Von Regensburg, was 38. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. He died on 26 January 1208, at the age of 83.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen est né environ 1126, son père, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Liukard Von Regensburg, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Il est décédé le 26 janvier 1208, à l’âge de 83 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen um 1126 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND 53 und seine Mutter Liukard Von Regensburg 38. Er hatte mit Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Januar 1208 im Alter von 83 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen è nato il circa 1126, il suo padre, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, aveva 53 anni e il suo madre, Liukard Von Regensburg, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Morì il 26 gennaio 1208, all'età di 83 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausenが約1126年に生まれた時，父Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜNDは53歳，母Liukard Von Regensburgは38歳であった。彼はAdelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausenとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1208年1月26日に83歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen(이)가 대략 1126년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND(은)는 53세였고, 그의 어머니 Liukard Von Regensburg(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1208년 1월 26일 83세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen nasceu aproximadamente 1126, seu pai, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Liukard Von Regensburg, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Ele faleceu em 26 de janeiro de 1208, com 83 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen родился около 1126 г., его отцу по имени Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Liukard Von Regensburg, 38. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Он умер 26 января 1208 г. в возрасте 83 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich II von Lechsgemünd Frontenhausen nació aproximadamente 1126, su papá, Heinrich VON LECHSGEMÜND, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Liukard Von Regensburg, tenía 38 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Adelheid von Plain Gräfin von Lechsgemünd-Frontenhausen. Murió el 26 de enero de 1208, a la edad de 83 años.
